hero.headline: Named outcomes, not capability lists.
hero.subhead: Six packaged engagements that match how enterprises actually buy from Vergent. Each one bundles delivery, expertise, and the tooling we ship in-house — accountable to a specific outcome, not a body-shop SOW.

intro.title: Solutions are how the work shows up — services are what we draw on to deliver them.
paragraphs: If you want a deeper read on the disciplines behind each engagement, the services page covers the capability surface. This page is the buying view — the engagements we propose, the outcomes we commit to, and the tooling that comes with them.

solutions.title: Oracle audit defence
solutions.summary: Turn an Oracle LMS letter from a $1M demand into a defensible $200K position.
solutions.body: We run a structured response to an active or impending Oracle audit — independent of Oracle's own tooling. Contract overlay, innocent-usage filtering, swap-and-sweep across shelf-ware, and a forensic remediation log. Outcome: a defensible liability number you can negotiate against, with evidence behind every variance.
outcomes: Independent re-calculation of Oracle's claimed liability
Variance report citing contract clauses, core factors, and usage thresholds
solutions.tooling: OCDP (Oracle Compliance Defense Platform) — Vergent-built engine that ingests LMS output and applies contract logic Oracle won't.

solutions.title: ERP audit & assurance
solutions.summary: Continuous, defensible audit across SAP, Oracle, Dynamics 365, NetSuite, and Sage estates.
solutions.body: Most enterprises rely on whatever their ERP vendor ships, which is rarely independent and never cross-platform. We give you a single audit pane across the eight platforms your real estate actually runs on — with 520+ checks, live connectors, and reports that survive scrutiny from internal audit, external auditors, and the board.
outcomes: Single audit view across SAP S/4HANA, Oracle Fusion, D365, NetSuite, Sage Intacct, Sage X3, AWS, and Azure
Findings mapped to the frameworks your auditors actually use
solutions.tooling: V/ergent — Vergent's ERP & cloud audit platform. Live at app.vergent.co.ke.

solutions.title: Cyber AIOps & SOC
solutions.summary: AI-driven detection, response, and continuous control monitoring across hybrid estates.
solutions.body: A 24×7 security operation that isn't a tier-one ticket farm. We run detection and response across hybrid and multi-cloud, with continuous control monitoring tied back to the frameworks your organisation already reports against. Partners include Cynet, Centerity, Dreamvise, and SysAid where they fit the brief.
outcomes: Round-the-clock detection and response across cloud and on-prem
Control-monitoring evidence aligned to ISO 27001, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, NCSC CAF, DORA, and NIS2
Incident response with senior responders, not first-line escalation
solutions.tooling: CyberCore — Vergent's multi-framework cyber assurance platform. Live at cyber.vergent.co.ke.

solutions.title: Cloud & licence rationalisation
solutions.summary: Reclaim budget and surface contract risk before renewal — Microsoft, Oracle, SAP, AWS, Azure.
solutions.body: Two problems that look separate but feed each other: software licences you bought before you knew what you'd use, and cloud bills that grew faster than the architecture justifies. We run them together — a single review that produces a rationalisation plan with the negotiation leverage built in.
outcomes: Licence position vs. actual usage, with rebalancing recommendations
Cloud spend review with right-sizing and reserved-capacity plays
Renewal-ready evidence pack before the vendor opens the conversation
solutions.tooling: Vergent delivery teams + the V/ergent audit platform feeding the data.

solutions.title: SAP S/4HANA & ERP modernisation
solutions.summary: Move off legacy ECC, JDE, or AX without breaking the integrations holding operations together.
solutions.body: ERP migrations fail because of integrations, not the ERP. We start from the integration inventory — the bespoke interfaces, scheduled jobs, and reports that nobody owns but everybody depends on — and design a S/4HANA (or Dynamics 365, or NetSuite) transition around them. Delivery from Nairobi, Dubai, Bishkek, Manila, and Bengaluru, in your time zone.
outcomes: Migration plan that respects the integrations you actually have
Continuous audit through cut-over with V/ergent connectors
Single accountable owner across SIs, internal teams, and partners
solutions.tooling: Vergent delivery + V/ergent extractors across the source and target estate.

solutions.title: Agentic AI in production
solutions.summary: Design, build, and operate the agents that increasingly run alongside enterprise systems.
solutions.body: The interesting work in agentic AI is not the prototype — it is the eval suites, the observability, the governance, and the boring engineering that lets a non-deterministic system run unattended next to your ERP. We build agents that survive contact with production, with the controls a regulated enterprise needs.
outcomes: Production-grade agents with eval suites and observability
Governance model aligned to your existing risk and compliance frameworks
Pragmatic scope — agents where they actually pay back, not where they look impressive
solutions.tooling: Vergent delivery — LLM-native development with Claude, OpenAI, and open-weight models where it fits.

callout.title: Most of our work starts with a scoped two-week assessment.
callout.body: Fixed scope, fixed price, a written recommendation at the end you can act on with or without us. If the recommendation says don't proceed, that's the recommendation.
